Author: ItsDash16
Description: Save the KTANE multiverse by solving a specific module when the timer on the bomb reaches 0. Tags: multiverse, space, 1-button, timer
Name: Multiverse Synchronization

Souvenir.Explanation: Souvenir could ask about the Solve Key used for defusing the module, and the module solved to defuse it. Examples: "What was the Solve Key in Multiverse Synchronization?"; "What module was defused to solve Multiverse Synchronization?"
